summary.en: Two-sided online learning marketplace where anyone can publish a course and any learner can take one. Long-tail catalog of 250,000+ courses competes by breadth, not credentials — Coursera owns degrees and MasterClass owns prestige; Udemy owns 'I need to learn this specific tool by Tuesday'. Public since 2021. The B2C consumer flywheel funnels into Udemy Business, the much higher-margin enterprise subscription product.
summary.zh: 双边在线学习市场:任何人都能开课、任何学习者都能上课。25 万+ 长尾课程库,差异点是「广度」而不是「证书」—— Coursera 占学位、MasterClass 占名人光环、Udemy 占「我下周二之前必须学会这个工具」。2021 年上市。C 端流量漏斗到 Udemy Business 企业订阅产品(后者毛利高得多)。
